title: Improve task filter accessibility semantics
description: Add ARIA state and descriptive labels to Workspace Tasks filter chips and clear-search controls so keyboard and screen-reader users can understand which filters are active and how to clear them.

title: Add tasks empty-column action copy
description: Make empty task columns explain their next action more clearly, especially on compact mobile layouts where the add button can be ambiguous.

title: Expose task board refresh status text
description: Add a small non-intrusive refresh status indicator for the task board so users know when background polling or manual refresh is happening.

title: Fix Vitest unit-test include/exclude baseline
description: Adjust Vitest configuration so Playwright E2E specs and Odysseus TAP .mjs suites are excluded from pnpm test and run only under their dedicated runners.

title: Add task board refresh status text
description: Show a subtle status line when Workspace Tasks is polling or manually refreshing so users know the board is updating in the background.

title: Improve compact task column labels
description: Add clearer empty-column and compact-column action labels for mobile and keyboard users, including accessible names for add buttons.

title: Clarify compact column drop targets
description: When a task is dragged over a compact empty column, expand the target with concise drop copy so users can tell exactly where the card will land.

title: Add focused test coverage for task column actions
description: Add component-level tests around compact and expanded task column add buttons so accessible labels and actions stay stable.

title: Fix Vitest collection baseline for E2E and TAP suites
description: Exclude Playwright e2e specs and Odysseus TAP .mjs tests from the default Vitest unit-test glob and document their dedicated runners.

title: Show task dependencies and blocked-state causes
description: Expose task prerequisite counts on cards and split blocked task stats into input-needed versus execution-error causes so operators know what to act on first.

title: Add configurable free retry model for task agents
description: When a task retry is needed, use a configurable fallback model with a free default instead of hardcoding a paid provider/model, preserving cost controls while improving reliability.

title: Archive stale untouched backlog tasks automatically
description: Move very old inactive backlog/todo tasks to done with an audit history entry so the deploy sweep stays focused on actionable work.
